textPlain: Note that https://peps.python.org/pep-0440/#direct-references says:> Public index servers SHOULD NOT allow the use of direct references in uploaded distributions. Direct references are intended as a tool for software integrators rather than publishers.This means that PyPI will not accept your project metadata as you currently have it configured. See https://github.com/pypi/warehouse/issues/7136 for more details.
Good writeup. PyTorch has generally been very good to me when I can mitigate its resource hogging at times. Production can be a little wonky but for everything else it works
